zh.lifeSummary: 當Sybil de Valognes於大約1128年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可帕哈姆時，她的父親Roger de Valognes Lord of Benington50歲，母親Agnes FitzJohn59歲。她於1144年與Sir Ralph Brito Albini在英國英格蘭越可爾約克結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。她去世在英國英格蘭越可爾易亞斯特 安德 韋斯特 阿普爾頓，埋葬在英國越可爾阿普爾頓 盧巴可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sybil de Valognes于大约1128年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可帕哈姆时，她的父亲Roger de Valognes Lord of Benington50岁，母亲Agnes FitzJohn59岁。她于1144年与Sir Ralph Brito Albini在英国英格兰越可爾約克结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。她去世在英国英格兰越可爾易亞斯特 安德 韋斯特 阿普爾頓，埋葬在英国越可爾阿普爾頓 盧巴可。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sybil
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Sybilla
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Sybil de Valognes was born about 1128, in Parham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Roger de Valognes Lord of Benington, was 50 and her mother, Agnes FitzJohn, was 59. She married Sir Ralph Brito Albini in 1144, in York, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. She died in East and West Appleton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Appleton Roebuck, Yorkshire, England.

fr.Appleton Priory, Yorkshire, England: East and West Appleton, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sybil de Valognes est née environ 1128, à Parham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger de Valognes Lord of Benington, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Agnes FitzJohn, avait 59 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Ralph Brito Albini en 1144, à York, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Elle est décédée à East and West Appleton, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Appleton Roebuck, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.Appleton Priory, Yorkshire, England: East and West Appleton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sybil de Valognes um 1128 in Parham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger de Valognes Lord of Benington 50 und ihre Mutter Agnes FitzJohn 59. Sie hat 1144 in York, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Ralph Brito Albini geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Sie starb in East and West Appleton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Appleton Roebuck, Yorkshire, England begraben.

Lei sposato Sir Ralph Brito Albini nel 1144, nel York, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì nel East and West Appleton, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolta a Appleton Roebuck, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sybil de Valognesが約1128年にイギリスイギリススフォルクパーハムで生まれた時，父Roger de Valognes Lord of Beningtonは50歳，母Agnes FitzJohnは59歳であった。1144年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアヨークでSir Ralph Brito Albiniと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアエアスト アンド ウエスト アップレトンで死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアアップレトン ローブックにて埋葬された。

ko.Appleton Priory, Yorkshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 앤드 웨스트 애플턴
ko.lifeSummary: Sybil de Valognes(이)가 대략 1128년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 파람에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger de Valognes Lord of Benington(은)는 50세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes FitzJohn(은)는 59세였다. 그녀는 1144년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 요르크에서 Sir Ralph Brito Albini(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 앤드 웨스트 애플턴에서 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 애플턴 로벅에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Sir Ralph Brito Albini em 1144, em York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em East and West Appleton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em Appleton Roebuck, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Appleton Priory, Yorkshire, England: эаст анд вест эпплетон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sybil de Valognes родилась около 1128 г. в местности парам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Roger de Valognes Lord of Benington было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes FitzJohn, 59. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Ralph Brito Albini в 1144 г. в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Она умерла в местности эаст анд вест эпплетон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности эпплетон роебукк, еркшир, Англия.
